lambda.alias.versionweight.CfnAbout: The [traffic-shifting](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/lambda-traffic-shifting-using-aliases.html) configuration of a Lambda function alias.

lambda.alias.versionweight.FunctionVersi.Description: The qualifier of the second version.

lambda.alias.versionweight.FunctionWeigh.Description: The percentage of traffic that the alias routes to the second version.
